raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Chis irr tas Wahrd̄s/ 
kas uhs Jeremiju no- 
tikke no ta KUNGA/ 
pehz ka winnu NebusarAdans 
tas Pils-Karra-Wihru Wirf- 
neeks bij atlaidis no Rahmas/ 
kad winsch to bij lizzis atiwest/ 
kad winsch ar Schkehdehm bija 
faischts starp wisfeem Jerusa- 
lemes un Juha' Zeetvmnee- 
keem/ kas uhs Babeli tappc ats- 
westi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas Pils-Karra-Wihru 
Wirfneeks likke Jeremiju atwest/ 
un fazzija uhs winnu : Tas 
KUNGS taws Deews irr fcho 
Laununu pahr fcho Weetu 
runnajs:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS irr to 
lizzis nahkt/ un darriis/ ka winsch 
irr runnajs/ jo juhs effat greh- 
kojschi prett to KUNGU/ un 
Winnu Balti ne klanfijfschi/ ta- 
pehz irr juns schi Leeta notiffuji.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad reds/ es tewi scho- 
deen wattu palaidischu no tahm 
Schkehdehm / kas ap tawas 
Rohkas irr/ ja tew patihk ar 
mannim uhs Babeli nahkt/ tad 
nahz/ es labbi pehz tewim luh- 
kojchu. Bet ja tas tewi ne pa- 
tihk ar mannim us Babeli nahkt/ 
tad lai stahw. Raugi/ wissa 
Semme irr tawā Preekchā/ 
kurp tew labbi patihk staigaht/ 
turp tu staiga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo turpmahk ne buhs At- 
greechanas/ tapehz greesees uhs 
Gedaltju/ Aikama Dehlu/ ta 
Dehla Sawana / fo tas Keh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "nisch no Babeles pahr teen 
Pilsfahtecin Juha irr eezehtis 
un dsihwo pee ta starp teem Lau- 
dim/ jeb wiffur/ kurp tew pa- 
tihe staigahrt/ turp staiga/ un ta- 
Pils-Karra-Wihru Wirfneek- 
dewe winnam Zetta-Barribu 
un Dahwanu/ un atlaidc winnu 

6. Ta nahze Jeremijus uhs 
Gedaliju Aikama Dehlu uhs 
Mizpu/ un winsch dsihwoja peg 
ta starp teem Landim / kas ta 
Semmē bij atlittkusch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Kad nu wiffi Karra Wirf- 
neeki/ kas Lauka turrejahs lihd 
ar faweem Karra-Wihreem/ dsir- 
deja/ ka tas Kehnisch no Ba- 
beles Gedaliju Aikama Dehlu 
pahr to Semmi bij eezehtis/ un 
ka winsch tam bij pawehleje 
Wihrus/ un Seewas/ un Behr- 
nius/ un tehs Nabbagus tahs 
Semmes/ no teem/ kas uhs Ba- 
beli ne bija westi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Tad nahze tee uhs Geda- 
lju uhs Mizpu/ prohti Jsunaëts 
Metanijus Dehts/ un Joanans/ 
un Jonatans Kareiis Dehli/ un 
Serajus Tanumeta Dehts/ un 
tee Dehli Ewajus ta Netown- 
titera/ un Jesanijus Määkatus 
Dehis lihdsar faweem Wihreem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Un Gedaltjus Aikama 
Dehle/ ta Dehla Sawana sweh- 
reja teem un winnu Wihreem/ 
un fazzija: Ne bibsteetes teem 
Kaldeereem kalpoht / palezceet 
eeksch Semmes / un kalpojeet 
tam Kehniram no Babeles/ tad 
juns labbi klahteet.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
